summary: Implementation review accepts lifecycle, rollback, registry, and offline validator changes as bounded Stage 5 Lode facts.
reviewed_validation_summary: python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py; python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py sites/example/read-public-page --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --json; python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json; git diff --check passed locally before PR.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The change exposes package lifecycle facts and validator checks without claiming runtime execution, hosted registry, App install truth, or private evidence storage.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Validator checks cover the new lifecycle, compatibility, rollback, and registry batch facts; the data remains refs-only.
